name: Pineapple Whatever Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 20 oz can of unsweetened pineapple juice
21 oz can of blueberry pie filling (or apple or cherry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan with Pam-type cooking spray.
3. Blend the pineapple juice until it resembles crushed pineapple and spread evenly in the prepared pan.
4. Add the pie filling on top of the pineapple mixture, spreading it out as well.
5. Sprinkle the yellow cake mix over the top layer, ensuring even coverage with Pam-type cooking spray to moisten lightly.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the filling bubbles on the sides.
7. Note that the fat content in this recipe comes only from the cake mix; using a lighter cake mix would further reduce overall fat.
